title: Lepidaploa boquerona
taxonomy: Lepidaploa boquerona belongs to the family Asteraceae, commonly known as the daisy or sunflower family. This classification is based on its characteristics and morphological features. Lepidaploa boquerona is a species of flowering plant in the genus Lepidaploa. Lepidaploa is a genus of flowering plants in the tribe Cynareae of the subfamily Asteroideae. The tribe Cynareae is a group of plants within the larger family Asteraceae.
